title: Software Engineer, AI Studio iOS Mobile - New York or Mountain View
company_focus: AI research and GenAI developer platforms
description:
Snapshot:

AI Studio is a playground (https://ai.studio) for GenAI
developers that showcases cutting edge Google models and
their features. It provides a platform for Gemini API users
to monitor and manage their usage. We’ve recently launched a
vibe coding platform (https://ai.studio/apps) that greatly
expands who can be a developer to now include all creators
and AI enthusiasts. We plan to bring this vibe coding
experience to mobile starting with iOS.

About us:

Artificial Intelligence could be one of humanity’s most
useful inventions. At Google DeepMind, we’re a team of
scientists, engineers, machine learning experts and more,
working together to advance the state of the art in
artificial intelligence. We use our technologies for
widespread public benefit and scientific discovery, and
collaborate with others on critical challenges, ensuring
safety and ethics are the highest priority.

The role:

Join Google's high-visibility AI Studio and Gemini API team
and shape the future of AI development! As a Software
Engineer, you will be a key contributor to AI Studio, a
playground (https://ai.studio) for GenAI developers and a
vibe coding platform (https://ai.studio/apps) that greatly
expands who can be a developer to include all creators and
AI enthusiasts. Your work will grow and support the
developer community around Google’s cutting-edge ML
technologies. Collaborate closely with product managers, UX,
and fellow engineers to prototype, design, develop, and
deploy innovative AI solutions. This opportunity has a high
impact potential that lies at the intersection of AI/ML and
developer products!

The Google AI Studio and Gemini API team builds an GenAI IDE
(aistudio.google.com) and its backend services for GenAI
developers, aiming to grow the developers community around
Google’s cutting-edge ML technologies. This opportunity has
a high impact potential that lies at the intersection of
AI/ML and distributed systems.

We are looking for outstanding, highly motivated mobile
development SWEs to build a brand new Google AI Studio
mobile app. We will start with iOS to explore product market
fit for an AI Studio Build mobile app. If you thrive in a
fast-paced, innovative environment, come join this team
where your technical expertise and passion for AI will
directly impact Google's AI strategy.

Key responsibilities:

You will partner closely with PM and UX to rapidly iterate
on ideas via working iOS mobile prototypes to explore
product market fit for a mobile vibe coding app. You will be
part of the team that launches a brand new Google AI Studio
Build mobile app.

This is a brand new team and we are looking for experienced,
TL and TL/M roles.

- Rapid prototyping of various iOS mobile app ideas.
- Design, develop, and deploy iOS mobile applications.
- Radically change the paradigm of software development, make
  it AI powered, further vibe coding capabilities of AI
  Studio.
- Contribute to the development of new AI tools and platforms.
- Stay up-to-date with the latest advancements in AI and
  software engineering.

About you:

In order to set you up for success as a Software Engineer at
Google DeepMind, we look for the following skills and
experience:

Qualifications and Skills:

- Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
- 8 years of experience in software development, with a focus
  on mobile development.
- 5 years of experience testing and launching software
  products.
- Proven experience in mobile software development, preferably
  with iOS / Swift.
- Strong interest in AI powered software development and vibe
  coding.
- Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.
- Strong communication and teamwork abilities.

In addition, the following would be an advantage:

Preferred Qualifications:

- Experience with middleware, Kotlin.
- Experience with Android, Flutter, or web development are a
  plus.
- Experience working with VibeCoding applications is a plus.
- Experience with Google's internal infrastructure (google3).
- Mobile development, ideally iOS, at Google.

The US base salary range for this full-time position is
between $197,000 - $291,000 + bonus + equity + benefits.
Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary
range for your targeted location during the hiring process.

Application deadline: 12pm GMT Friday 9th January 2026

Note: In the event your application is successful and an
offer of employment is made to you, any offer of employment
will be conditional on the results of a background check,
performed by a third party acting on our behalf. For more
information on how we handle your data, please see our
Applicant and Candidate Privacy Policy.

At Google DeepMind, we value diversity of experience,
knowledge, backgrounds and perspectives and harness these
qualities to create extraordinary impact. We are committed
to equal employment opportunities regardless of sex, race,
religion or belief, ethnic or national origin, disability,
age, citizenship, marital, domestic or civil partnership
status, sexual orientation, gender identity, pregnancy, or
related condition (including breastfeeding) or any other
basis as protected by applicable law. If you have a
disability or additional need that requires accommodation,
please do not hesitate to let us know.
responsibilities: Rapid prototyping of various iOS mobile app ideas
Design, develop, and deploy iOS mobile applications
Partner closely with PM and UX to iterate on working iOS mobile prototypes
Contribute to the development of new AI tools and platforms
Launch a brand new Google AI Studio Build mobile app
Stay up-to-date with the latest advancements in AI and software engineering
use_cases: Mobile vibe coding platform that expands who can be a developer
GenAI playground showcasing cutting edge Google models
Platform for Gemini API users to monitor and manage their usage
Mobile app for AI Studio GenAI IDE
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a mobile software engineering role building the iOS
app for AI Studio, which is a developer tool/platform for
GenAI. The engineer will build the mobile application
interface and infrastructure, not work directly on AI
models, LLMs, or machine learning systems themselves. The
role focuses on iOS development, rapid prototyping, and
deploying mobile applications that enable others to use AI
tools.
